description: Languages 7-10 (Background Language pathway) capability progression map. Labels are generic and use 'the target language' so the file can be reused across languages.
subject: Languages

_notes.generic_structure: This file uses the 7-8 and 9-10 background language achievement standards only. Labels use 'the target language' so the file can be reused across languages.
_notes.code_note: Keep ACARA codes unchanged unless your renderer explicitly supports code substitution.

standards.title: Initiate and sustain exchanges in varied contexts
standards.description: initiate and sustain exchanges in familiar and unfamiliar contexts related to students’ experiences, feelings and views, adjusting their language in response to others
standards.capability_goal: Students initiate and sustain exchanges in familiar and unfamiliar contexts, adjusting language in response to others.

standards.title: Collaborate through transacting and negotiating
standards.description: collaborate in activities that involve the language of transacting, negotiating and justifying to plan events
standards.capability_goal: Students collaborate in activities involving transacting, negotiating and justifying to plan events.

standards.title: Interpret and analyse ideas in texts
standards.description: interpret and analyse information, ideas and opinions in a range of spoken, written and multimodal texts, and respond appropriately to cultural context, purpose and audience
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret and analyse information, ideas and opinions in texts and respond appropriately to cultural context, purpose and audience.

standards.title: Interpret and translate across contexts
standards.description: interpret and translate non-verbal, spoken and written language to convey meaning in a range of familiar and unfamiliar cultural contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret and translate non-verbal, spoken and written language to convey meaning in familiar and unfamiliar cultural contexts.

standards.title: Create texts for context, purpose and audience
standards.description: create and present spoken, written and multimodal informative and imaginative texts, manipulating language to suit context, purpose and audience
standards.capability_goal: Students create and present spoken, written and multimodal informative and imaginative texts, manipulating language to suit context, purpose and audience.

standards.title: Use tonal and spoken features for fluency
standards.description: use tone-syllables and apply intonation, stress and phrasing to develop fluency, and respond to and create texts in a range of contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students use tonal and spoken features to develop fluency and respond to and create texts in a range of contexts.

standards.title: Apply writing system and syntax knowledge
standards.description: apply knowledge of character form and function, sentence structures, syntax, and writing system features to infer meaning and to compose a range of texts
standards.capability_goal: Students apply knowledge of character form and function, sentence structures, syntax and writing system features to infer meaning and compose texts.

standards.title: Reflect on similarities and differences
standards.description: reflect on and explain similarities and differences between the target language and English language structures and features, using metalanguage
standards.capability_goal: Students reflect on and explain similarities and differences between the target language and English language structures and features using metalanguage.

standards.title: Explain identity shaped by language and culture
standards.description: reflect on and explain how their own and others’ identity is shaped by language(s), culture(s), attitudes, beliefs and values
standards.capability_goal: Students reflect on and explain how identity is shaped by language, culture, attitudes, beliefs and values.

standards.title: Initiate, sustain and extend exchanges
standards.description: initiate, sustain and extend exchanges in a range of contexts, responding to ideas, opinions and perspectives
standards.capability_goal: Students initiate, sustain and extend exchanges in a range of contexts, responding to ideas, opinions and perspectives.

standards.title: Contribute to discussions with diverse views
standards.description: contribute to discussions that involve diverse views to negotiate outcomes, address issues and compare cultural experiences
standards.capability_goal: Students contribute to discussions involving diverse views to negotiate outcomes, address issues and compare cultural experiences.

standards.title: Analyse and evaluate ideas across texts
standards.description: analyse and evaluate information, ideas and perspectives in a broad range of spoken, written and multimodal texts and respond appropriately to cultural context, purpose and audience
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse and evaluate information, ideas and perspectives in a broad range of texts and respond appropriately to cultural context, purpose and audience.

standards.title: Interpret and translate to explain meaning
standards.description: interpret and translate a range of non-verbal, spoken and written texts, and explain how meaning is conveyed to reflect cultural context, purpose and audience
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret and translate a range of texts and explain how meaning is conveyed to reflect cultural context, purpose and audience.

standards.title: Create texts for diverse contexts and audiences
standards.description: create and present informative and imaginative texts for diverse contexts and purposes, selecting vocabulary, expressions, sentence structures and textual features and conventions to engage different audiences
standards.capability_goal: Students create and present informative and imaginative texts for diverse contexts and purposes, selecting vocabulary, expressions, sentence structures and conventions to engage different audiences.

standards.title: Apply spoken features and conventions for fluency
standards.description: apply features and conventions of spoken the target language to extend fluency in responding to and creating texts appropriate to contexts, purposes and audiences
standards.capability_goal: Students apply features and conventions of spoken language to extend fluency in responding to and creating texts appropriate to contexts, purposes and audiences.

standards.title: Apply writing system and grammatical knowledge
standards.description: apply knowledge of character form and function, and complex grammatical structures and features, to predict meaning and to compose a wide range of texts
standards.capability_goal: Students apply knowledge of character form and function and complex grammatical structures to predict meaning and compose a wide range of texts.

standards.title: Analyse texts using metalanguage
standards.description: analyse a range of target language texts, using metalanguage to explain linguistic, textual and cultural elements
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse a range of target language texts using metalanguage to explain linguistic, textual and cultural elements.

standards.title: Evaluate identity and communication
standards.description: reflect on and evaluate how their own and others’ identity is shaped by language(s), culture(s), attitudes, beliefs and values, and how these affect ways of communicating
standards.capability_goal: Students reflect on and evaluate how identity is shaped by language, culture, attitudes, beliefs and values, and how these affect ways of communicating.

communicating.label: Communicating meaning in the target language

mediating.label: Mediating meaning in and between languages

creating.label: Creating text in the target language

understanding_culture.label: Understanding the interrelationship of language and culture
